com.zwo

类 ZwoCamera

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.zwo.CommonCamera
      • com.zwo.ZwoCamera

  • public class ZwoCamera
extends CommonCamera
    Created by Jiang Rui on 2016/11/11.

      构造器和说明

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE closeCamera() 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE disableDarkSubtract() 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE enableDarkSubtract(java.lang.String pcBMPPath)

      static ASIReturnType getCameraProperty(int index)

      ASIReturnType getControlCapsByIndex(int index)
      call getNumOfControl first
      ASIReturnType getControlValue(int controlType) 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE getDataAfterExp(ASIImageBuffer pBuffer, int lBuffSize) 
      ASIReturnType getDroppedFrames() 
      ASIReturnType getExpStatus() 
      ASIReturnType getGainOffset()

      Get the start position of current ROI area .
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE getVideoData(ASIImageBuffer pBuffer, int lBuffSize, int iWaitms) 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE initCamera() 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE openCamera() 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE pulseGuideOff(ASIConstants.ASI_GUIDE_DIRECTION direction)
      PulseGuide of the ST4 port off. this function only work on the module which have ST4 port make sure where is ASIPulseGuideOn and there is ASIPulseGuideOff
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE pulseGuideOn(ASIConstants.ASI_GUIDE_DIRECTION direction)
      PulseGuide of the ST4 port on. this function only work on the module which have ST4 port
      int setControlValue(int cotrolType, long value, int auto) 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE setID(java.lang.String ID) 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE setRoiFormat(int imgWidth, int imgHeight, int iBin, int imgType) 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE setStartPos(int x, int y)
      set the start position of current ROI area .
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE startExposure(boolean bIsDark)
      Start camera exposure. the following 4 API is usually used when long exposure required start exposure and check the exposure status then get the data
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE startVideoCapture() 
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE stopExposure()
      to cancel the long exposure which is on.
      ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE stopVideoCapture()

    • 方法详细资料

      • getNumOfConnectedCameras

        public static int getNumOfConnectedCameras()

      • getCameraProperty

        public static ASIReturnType getCameraProperty(int index)
        参数:
        index - 0 means the first connect camera, 1 means the second connect camera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the ASICameraProperty Object with the number of controls, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getCameraID

        public int getCameraID()
        返回:
        cameraID

      • getNumOfControls

        public ASIReturnType getNumOfControls()
        指定者:
        getNumOfControls 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the Integer Object with the number of controls available for this camera. the camera need be opened at first., call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getDroppedFrames

        public ASIReturnType getDroppedFrames()
        指定者:
        getDroppedFrames 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the Integer Object with the number of DroppedFrames, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getExpStatus

        public ASIReturnType getExpStatus()
        指定者:
        getExpStatus 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the ASI_EXPOSURE_STATUS Object, it's "value" property represent a specific status, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getControlCaps

        public ASIReturnType getControlCaps(int controlType)
        指定者:
        getControlCaps 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the ASIControlCap Object with the number of controls, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getControlCapsByIndex

        public ASIReturnType getControlCapsByIndex(int index)
        call getNumOfControl first
        指定者:
        getControlCapsByIndex 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the ASIControlCap Object with the number of controls, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getControlValue

        public ASIReturnType getControlValue(int controlType)
        指定者:
        getControlValue 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getExtraLongVal1(),you can get the control value, call ASIReturnType.getExtraBoolVal1(),you can get a bool value, true: auto model.

      • getID

        public ASIReturnType getID()
        指定者:
        getID 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get the char array Object represent the id of the camera, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getStartPos

        public ASIReturnType getStartPos()
        Get the start position of current ROI area .
        指定者:
        getStartPos 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get a ASIPosition Object, call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • setID

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE setID(java.lang.String ID)
        指定者:
        setID 在类中 CommonCamera
        参数:
        ID - a string with max 8 characters which will be written to the camera, it may be helpful for someone to identify a specific camera from a plurality of cameras with same type.
        返回:
        ASI_ERROR_CODE.

      • setStartPos

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE setStartPos(int x,
                                               int y)
        set the start position of current ROI area .
        指定者:
        setStartPos 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        ASI_ERROR_CODE.

      • getGainOffset

        public ASIReturnType getGainOffset()
        指定者:
        getGainOffset 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get a ASIGainOffset Object , call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • getROIFormat

        public ASIReturnType getROIFormat()
        指定者:
        getROIFormat 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
        call ASIReturnType.getObj(),you can get a ASIROIFormat Object , call ASIReturnType.getErrorCode(),you can get a ASI_ERROR_CODE Object.

      • pulseGuideOn

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE pulseGuideOn(ASIConstants.ASI_GUIDE_DIRECTION direction)
        PulseGuide of the ST4 port on. this function only work on the module which have ST4 port
        指定者:
        pulseGuideOn 在类中 CommonCamera
        参数:
        direction - the direction of guider
        返回:
        ASI_ERROR_CODE

      • pulseGuideOff

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE pulseGuideOff(ASIConstants.ASI_GUIDE_DIRECTION direction)
        PulseGuide of the ST4 port off. this function only work on the module which have ST4 port make sure where is ASIPulseGuideOn and there is ASIPulseGuideOff
        指定者:
        pulseGuideOff 在类中 CommonCamera
        参数:
        direction - the direction of guider
        返回:
        ASI_ERROR_CODE

      • startExposure

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE startExposure(boolean bIsDark)
        Start camera exposure. the following 4 API is usually used when long exposure required start exposure and check the exposure status then get the data
        指定者:
        startExposure 在类中 CommonCamera
        参数:
        bIsDark - means dark frame if there is mechanical shutter on the camera. otherwise useless
        返回:
        ASI_ERROR_CODE

      • stopExposure

        public ASIConstants.ASI_ERROR_CODE stopExposure()
        to cancel the long exposure which is on.
        指定者:
        stopExposure 在类中 CommonCamera
        返回:
